meanings.definition: a close personal relationship that forms between people (as between husband and wife or parent and child)
(dentistry) a technique for repairing a tooth; resinous material is applied to the surface of the tooth where it adheres to the tooth's enamel

examples: Will this wallpaper adhere to the wall?
The grandparents want to bond with the child

meanings.definition: bring together in a common cause or emotion
examples: The death of their child had drawn them together
